zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Maunsell於1180年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾蕾托 米森登時，他的父親Sir Robert Maunsell44歲，母親Joice d'Alneto46歲。他和Hawisia de Somery至少有7個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於大約1250年享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Maunsell于1180年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾蕾托 米森登时，他的父亲Sir Robert Maunsell44岁，母亲Joice d'Alneto46岁。他和Hawisia de Somery至少有7个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于大约1250年享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maunsell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mansell
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Old French mansel ‘inhabitant of Le Mans or the surrounding area of Maine’. The place was originally named in Latin (ad) Ceromannos, from the name of the Gaulish tribe living there, the Ceromanni. The name was shortened to Celmans and then became Le Mans as a result of the mistaken identification of the first syllable with the Old French demonstrative adjective.
status name for a particular type of feudal tenant, Anglo-Norman French mansel, one who occupied a manse (from Late Latin mansa ‘dwelling’), a measure of land sufficient to support one family.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Maunsell was born in 1180, in Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Robert Maunsell, was 44 and his mother, Joice d'Alneto, was 46. He had at least 7 sons and 3 daughters with Hawisia de Somery. He died about 1250, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Maunsell est né en 1180, à Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Maunsell, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Joice d'Alneto, avait 46 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles avec Hawisia de Somery. Il est décédé environ 1250, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Maunsell 1180 in Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Maunsell 44 und seine Mutter Joice d'Alneto 46. Er hatte mit Hawisia de Somery mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1250 im Alter von 71 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Maunsell è nato il nel 1180 nel Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Maunsell, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Joice d'Alneto, aveva 46 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie con Hawisia de Somery. Morì circa 1250, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Maunsellが1180年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアリットル ミセンデンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Maunsellは44歳，母Joice d'Alnetoは46歳であった。彼はHawisia de Someryとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1250年に71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Maunsell(이)가 1180년 영국 벅잉함실르 리틀 미센든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Maunsell(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Joice d'Alneto(은)는 46세였다. 그는 Hawisia de Somery(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1250년 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Malden, Surrey, England: Malden, Sūþrīge, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Maunsell nasceu em 1180, em Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Maunsell, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Joice d'Alneto, tinha 46 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas com Hawisia de Somery. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1250, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Maunsell родился в 1180 г. в местности литл миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Maunsell было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Joice d'Alneto, 46. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери от Hawisia de Somery. Он умер около 1250 г. в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Maunsell nació en 1180, en Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Maunsell, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Joice d'Alneto, tenía 46 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas con Hawisia de Somery. Murió aproximadamente 1250, a la edad de 71 años.
